name: grailzee-eval
description: Grailzee deal evaluator and cycle reporting agent for Vardalux Collections

tools.name: evaluate_deal
tools.description: Evaluate a Grailzee deal against the cycle plan and bucket cache

brand.description: Watch brand, e.g. Tudor or Rolex

listing_price.description: Asking price in USD; strip $ and commas before passing (e.g. 2750)

dial_numerals.description: Dial numerals style: Arabic, Roman, Stick, or No Numerals. Pass only when the operator names it.

auction_type.description: Auction type: NR (No Reserve) or RES (Reserve). Pass only when the operator names it.

dial_color.description: Dial color, e.g. Black, Blue, Pink, White. Pass only when the operator names it.

tools.name: report_pipeline
tools.description: Regenerate the bucket cache from a Grailzee Pro report

input_report.description: Absolute path to the Grailzee Pro .xlsx workbook

output_folder.description: Absolute path to the output folder for the run summary

tools.name: ledger_manager
tools.description: Read or write entries to the trade ledger

subcommand.description: Operation: log a trade, summarize ledger, show premium stats, or roll up a cycle

sell_date.description: Sale date in YYYY-MM-DD format; defaults to today

since.description: Filter start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: message
tools.description: Send Telegram messages with optional inline buttons

text.description: Message text to send to the operator

buttons.description: Optional inline keyboard rows; each row is an array of button objects

text.description: Button label visible to the operator

callback_data.description: Callback data returned when the operator taps the button
